title: Set App LED
description: Sets the reader APP LED to the specified color

command.description: The value for the key command must be set_appled

command_id.description: A unique ID that will be echoed back in the command response by the reader.

payload.title: set_appled
payload.description:
Sets the reader APP LED to the specified color

Note: whenever the seconds is set to 0 it is necessary to turn off the LED by setting it to off

color.description: The color of the LED (red, amber, green)

seconds.description: The duration in seconds for the LED state to be in effect

flash.description: A value indicating whether to flash the LED
